rendering: anime-style cel shading with controlled soft gradients
page_treatment: finished color manga page with readable panel borders
generation_method: GPT Image2 raster image generation, not SVG/HTML/CSS/canvas
speech_bubbles: GPT Image2 renders final speech bubbles, exact dialogue, narration boxes, and sound effects natively inside the artwork; Hanzi, digits, English letters, capitalization, spacing, and punctuation must be preserved exactly
narration_boxes: integrated style-matched manga narration boxes, not plain white rectangular labels
paneling: dynamic Japanese manga page composition with varied panel sizes, anchor panels, close-up inserts, expressive gutters, irregular frames, diagonal cuts, overlapping panels, and expressive border-breaking by characters or important props
avoid: dialogue assigned to the wrong speaker
speech bubble tail pointing to the wrong character
blank speech bubbles unless explicitly requested
overly straight mechanical panel borders when drama calls for expressive framing
